prompt: Approved river bluff branch with blocker cue: choose action.
why_v1: Raise as a river bluff with this blocker profile. Calling keeps the pot small and gives up fold pressure.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Bluff line is active in this river spot.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The blocker cue matters here, so betting the river applies fold pressure better than checking.
